label: Transparent halite cube motif
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: transparent motif source for Morphous Halite, saved later as /systems/morphous-halite/motif.png
Primary request: Create one isolated halite cube crystal motif on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: a precise cluster of halite salt cubes from a salt flat, clear salt-white translucent-looking cubic crystals rendered as mostly opaque glassy whites for clean cutout, pale pink internal shadows, faint brine inclusions, sharp cubic edges, subtle milky facets, minimal storage-system precision.
Composition: centered object, three-quarter front view, generous padding, no crop, no ground plane.
Style: polished high-resolution 3D editorial mineral render, crisp silhouette, no text.
Chroma-key requirements: background must be one uniform #00ff00 color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject. No cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for /systems/morphous-halite/design-system-light.png
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Halite" / "Halite" inspired by a halite cube crystal from a salt flat.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, 4K-class composition.
System feel: minimal storage system, clear inventory logic, cubic salt geometry, quiet utilitarian order, sparse labels, disciplined shelving and bin metaphors.
Palette: clear salt white #fbfaf7, brine ink #2b2826, salt blush #eec7c7, pale rose shadow #c9989a, cube edge grey #d9d3ce, brine blue-grey #879aa0, compressed clay #a66f65, warm crystal highlight #fff7ec, deep mineral brown #1d1917. Use mostly white and mineral greys with restrained pink shadow accents.
Required visible sections: Morphous Halite, Halite, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Assets.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, component inventory table, token inspector tile, loading, empty, error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: clear salt-white background, flat storage shelves and cubby-grid layouts, translucent cubic dividers, soft pink cast shadows inside cube edges, thin grey borders, brown ink text, blush primary actions, blue-grey secondary data, cubic halite motif preview, 6px radii, subtle salt-flat texture, minimal dense operational dashboard layout.
Text quality: keep all labels large and legible; avoid tiny token tables; no Lorem ipsum; no generic purple or blue gradient UI.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for /systems/morphous-halite/design-system-dark.png
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Halite" / "Halite" translated from light mode into a minimal storage system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, 4K-class composition.
System feel: minimal storage system, clear inventory logic, cubic salt geometry, quiet utilitarian order, sparse labels, disciplined shelving and bin metaphors.
Palette: deep mineral brown #1d1917, salt-white text #fbfaf7, dark brine panel #2b2826, smoked salt panel #393432, salt blush #eec7c7, pale rose shadow #c9989a, cube edge grey #d9d3ce, brine blue-grey #879aa0, compressed clay #a66f65. Use deep warm mineral neutrals with restrained pink shadow highlights and clear white text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Halite, Halite, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Assets.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, component inventory table, token inspector tile, loading, empty, error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: deep mineral-brown background, smoked salt panels, clear salt-white text, thin translucent cube-edge borders, blush primary actions, pale rose focus rings, blue-grey secondary data, cubic halite motif preview glowing subtly, storage shelf and cubby-grid structure, 6px radii, subtle dark salt-flat texture, compact operational dashboard layout.
Text quality: keep all labels large and legible; avoid tiny token tables; no Lorem ipsum; no generic purple or blue gradient UI.
